Account

Delete Account

How to delete your Maatriks account

You can delete your Maatriks account at any time from within the mobile app. This page explains how and what happens when you do.

How to delete your account

  1. Open the Maatriks app on your device
  2. Go to Settings (accessible from your profile)
  3. Scroll to Account
  4. Tap Delete Account
  5. Confirm the deletion when prompted

What happens when you delete your account

When you confirm account deletion:

  • Your account credentials and profile information are permanently removed
  • Your workout logs and training history are deleted
  • Your AI coaching data and conversation history are deleted
  • Any active subscription is not automatically cancelled — see below

Subscriptions

Deleting your Maatriks account does not cancel an active App Store or Google Play subscription. To avoid being charged after deletion, cancel your subscription through your device's subscription settings before deleting your account.

Data retention

After deletion, your personal data is removed from our active systems. Some anonymized, non-identifiable data may be retained for analytics and service improvement. No personally identifiable information is kept after deletion.

Need help?

If you're unable to delete your account through the app, or if you have questions about the process, contact us:

support@maatriks.ai

Related pages

  • Support — general help and contact
